Offer format

Growth build sprint

A focused sprint to ship a conversion-ready website, app module, or AI automation with clear priorities.

Included in the sprint

  • Strategy workshop and scope lock
  • Design + fullstack implementation
  • QA, launch, and actionable handover

Kickoff

within 7 days

Delivery window

3 to 6 weeks

Replies

< 24h on weekdays

Technical partner in Marseille for acquisition and execution

Based in Marseille and working with teams across France and internationally, I build conversion-focused websites, full-stack web applications, and AI automation systems connected to real operations. Over 10+ years and 50+ delivered missions, I help teams move from fragmented stacks to consistent execution: clearer acquisition, faster delivery, and stronger decision support. My approach combines product thinking, UX, technical architecture, SEO/GEO, and n8n automation to create experiences that generate qualified leads while reducing internal friction. If your website under-converts, your team repeats too many manual tasks, or your roadmap is slowing down, I can structure a focused sprint with clear priorities, realistic timelines, and measurable impact from strategy to production.

Website Development App Development AI Automation n8n Workflows
How I help

Four service tracks. One growth system.

Each card leads to a dedicated service page with offer scope, targeted FAQ, and a clear next step.

Pipeline Growth

Website Development

Turn your site into a pipeline with sharper positioning, search-ready structure, and pages built to convert qualified demand.

  • Offer and messaging clarity
  • Conversion UX and page architecture
  • Technical SEO and schema foundations
  • Analytics-ready website delivery

Product Velocity

App Development

Ship product faster with a senior full-stack partner who can scope, build, and release features without stacking technical risk.

  • Feature scoping with technical guardrails
  • Frontend + backend implementation
  • API, data model, and auth alignment
Explore app delivery service
Operational AI

AI Automation

Automate repetitive workflows with AI systems connected to your stack so your team saves time and executes with fewer handoffs.

  • AI integrations tied to business workflows
  • Lead qualification and support triage automation
  • Guardrails for quality and reliability
Explore AI automation service
Workflow Reliability

n8n Workflows

Build reliable n8n workflows for CRM sync, routing, alerts, and cross-tool orchestration with proper monitoring and ownership.

  • n8n architecture standards and naming
  • Retries, fallbacks, and failure visibility
  • Automation stability at scale
Explore n8n integration service

What we analyze

  • Conversion leaks on your website or landing pages
  • Automation opportunities with n8n and no-code tools

Case studies

Projects shipped with business impact.

Marketing Platform 2022 — 2025
PayFit

Marketing platform rebuild with scalable delivery

Built and shipped marketing platform features on Gatsby and React, with HubSpot modules and AWS Lambda services used by marketing and engineering teams.

A more reliable platform for campaigns, with faster handoffs between business and engineering.

  • Shipped production features on the corporate website in TypeScript
  • Delivered backend services with AWS Lambda for marketing operations
  • Built HubSpot modules and internal automations (Zapier, Slack workflows)
Gatsby React TypeScript AWS Lambda HubSpot
3 years
continuous delivery
B2B SaaS Product 2025 — Today
Fulll

Product features and maintainable front-end architecture

Built product features in a React and TypeScript stack with Redux state architecture and Material UI standards in a Scrum environment.

A clearer product surface and a codebase that supports faster iteration sprint after sprint.

  • Delivered complex B2B workflows with reusable UI components
  • Structured Redux flows for multi-step product journeys
  • Used code reviews and GitHub Projects to keep delivery quality high
React TypeScript Redux Material UI GitHub Projects
2-week
sprint cadence
AI Product 2025 — Today
L'assistant des Profs

Agentic workflow for teacher-ready lesson generation

Designed and built an end-to-end workflow that transforms educational programs into structured lesson plans using OpenAI, NotebookLM, Notion, and automation.

A concrete AI service with published pedagogical assets and an active SaaS roadmap.

  • Built the full generation pipeline from source material to publish-ready content
  • Published pedagogical hub, program mindmap, and public waitlist
  • Structured product roadmap with BMAD (epics, stories, acceptance criteria)
OpenAI NotebookLM Notion BMAD Next.js
1 pipeline
source to lesson

Galileo Global Education

Led delivery between business and technical teams, wrote product requirements, tracked release quality, and coordinated roadmap priorities.

team led

How we work

Clear process. Fast execution.

01

Audit & scope

We define your goals, user journey, and priority outcomes before writing any code.

02

Architecture & UX

You get a clean technical plan and interface direction aligned with conversion and usability.

03

Build & automate

I deliver production-ready code plus AI automations and n8n/no-code workflows when relevant.

04

Launch & optimize

Deployment, QA, documentation, and post-launch optimization to improve conversion and operations.

FAQ

Questions about websites, apps, AI automation, and n8n.

What services do you offer?

I build conversion-focused websites, full-stack web applications, AI automation systems, and workflow integrations with n8n or no-code tools.

Can you integrate n8n with my current stack?

Yes. I design and implement n8n workflows connected to your CRM, forms, databases, APIs, and AI tools to remove repetitive manual work.

Do you also handle SEO and GEO optimization?

Yes. I optimize technical SEO, on-page structure, and AI-search readiness (GEO) so your website can rank in Google and be easier to cite by AI assistants.

How long does a typical project take?

Most focused projects are delivered in about 3 to 6 weeks depending on scope, integrations, and number of pages or workflows.

What do you include in the free audit?

You receive a prioritized diagnostic, quick wins, and a practical delivery roadmap for website performance, automation, and acquisition.

Do you work in white-label mode for agencies?

Yes. I regularly collaborate in white-label with agencies and product teams, with clear communication, strict deadlines, and clean handover documentation.

Marseille, France
About me

Merwan Guerrib

I am a fullstack developer focused on one thing: shipping digital products that generate measurable business outcomes.

Over the last 10+ years, I have delivered projects for teams like PayFit and Capgemini, from high-traffic websites to complex product features.

Today, I combine development, AI automation, and product thinking to help founders and teams move faster without sacrificing quality.
